text:
Not attempted due to medical conditions or safety concerns CHAR 2 x x
GG0170S3_WHEEL_150_END_CD GG0170S3 Mobility: Ability to Wheel at Least 150 Feet in Corridor at Discharge Indicates the patient's ability to wheel the wheelchair or scooter at least 150 feet in a corridor or similar space at discharge. 06. Independent – Patient completes the activity by him/herself with no assistance from a helper.
05. Setup or clean-up assistance – Helper sets up or cleans up; patient completes activity.
